author: jsign
content:
We are soon moving away from `witness-generator-cli` and rely on EEST fixtures also for benchmarks. The idea is that `zkevm-releases@...` have both tests and benchmarks (the latter filled with geth t8n).

That will provide a single format for everything and we can avoid this extra `witenss-generator-cli` tool since everything will be in the `statelessInputBytes` and `statelessOutputBytes` in the EEST fixtures.

For "live networks" `statelessInputBytes` generation, I would recomend using `witness-generator-spec-cli` which is a separate and simpler tool I created a week ago that uses a CL and EL RPCs to create the `statelessInputBytes` for a live network.

LMK if htat makes sense to you.
